# Arun Neupane

> Arun Neupane (also known as arundada9000, "Arun the coder", or "Arun from Nepal")
> is a self-taught frontend developer and coder from Butwal, Lumbini, Nepal, and the
> CTO of Sajilo Digital. He builds production React, Next.js and TypeScript web systems.

## Identity

- **Full name:** Arun Neupane
- **Also known as:** arundada9000, Arun, Arun the coder, Arun from Nepal
- **Role:** Frontend Developer · CTO & Lead Architect at Sajilo Digital
- **Location:** Butwal, Lumbini Province, Nepal
- **Email:** arunneupane0000@gmail.com
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +977 9811420975
- **Website:** https://arunneupane.vercel.app (also https://arun.sajilodigital.com.np)
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/arundada9000
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/arundada9000

## What he does

Arun specialises in frontend and full-stack web development with React, Next.js,
TypeScript, Node.js, PostgreSQL and MongoDB. As CTO of Sajilo Digital he leads
architecture for client production systems.

## Notable work

- **Nagrik Sahayata Pradali** — a police internal case-management system for Area Police Office Butwal (Next.js, PostgreSQL, Prisma, JWT, Docker).
- **Code for Change Nepal** — a full-stack platform (40+ pages, 22 API modules, 7-role RBAC, WebAuthn passkeys) for Nepal's IT student community.
- **Sajilo Digital** — a cinematic company website with an in-page terminal and Web Speech API voice control (Next.js 16, GSAP, Framer Motion).
- **Sajilo Sahayata (devnet)** — a real-time disaster-reporting PWA with offline-first sync and multilingual SMS.
- **Roomeo** — a map-first room finder using PostGIS geospatial search.
- **Easy Sorting** — an algorithm visualizer built in vanilla JavaScript.

## Skills

React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, MongoDB,
Prisma, WebAuthn, Tailwind CSS, GSAP, Framer Motion, Docker, Vercel.

## Achievements

- InnovateX National Hackathon — Winner
- CodeOlympiad 2080 — Winner
- Girls in ICT Coding Competition — Winner

## Community

- Vice Secretary, Code for Change Rupandehi (teaches React and Git).
- Vice Secretary, BMCIT Club — co-organised CodeOlympiad 2081.

For freelance, full-time, or consulting work: arunneupane0000@gmail.com
